welcome_title: Welcome to the Eriksen Flanker Task
welcome_p1: This test measures selective attention and your ability to ignore distracting information. You will see a row of letters on the screen.
welcome_p2: Your task is to respond to the middle letter as quickly and accurately as possible, while ignoring the flanking letters on either side.
welcome_p3: The test consists of {{trials}} short trials and takes about 5 minutes.
tutorial_step1_text: Keep your eyes on the fixation cross (+) in the middle of the screen. A row of seven letters will appear centered on that spot.
tutorial_step2_text: Only the middle letter matters. Ignore the six flanking letters, even if they try to pull you toward the wrong answer.
tutorial_step3_text: Press F if the middle letter is H or K. Press J if the middle letter is S or C. Respond as quickly as you can without sacrificing accuracy.
tutorial_step4_text: Some trials will have flankers that match the target; others will have flankers that pull you toward the opposite key. Resist the interference.
demo_step1: First you see a fixation cross. Keep your eyes on it.
demo_step2: Congruent trial: all flankers are on the same response side as the target — easy.
demo_step3: The screen clears before the next trial.
demo_step4: Incongruent trial: flankers pull you toward the wrong key. Ignore them and respond to the middle letter.
demo_step5: Blank — get ready for a neutral trial.
demo_step6: Neutral trial: flankers are unrelated letters that don't map to any response.
demo_step7: That's all there is to it. Ready to practice?
practice_complete_text1: Well done. You're ready for the full test.
practice_complete_text2: Remember: respond to the middle letter only. F for H or K, J for S or C.
settings_total_trials_desc: Total number of trials in the real test
settings_flankers_per_side_desc: Number of flanker letters on each side of the target
settings_fixation_duration_desc: How long the fixation cross is shown before each stimulus
settings_response_window_desc: Maximum time to respond before the trial counts as missed
settings_stimulus_color_desc: Color of the target and flanker letters
footer_description: A classic measure of selective attention and response inhibition (Eriksen & Eriksen, 1974).
